name: Embervale Settlement
seasonal_change: freeze and storm periods turn Embervale into a packed refuge, triage node, and labor rebalancing center.
seasonal_effects: freeze and storm periods turn Embervale into a packed refuge, triage node, and labor rebalancing center.
Public schedules, prices, crowding, and enforcement intensity all change before locals bother explaining why.
Ceremony, supply pressure, and route reliability do not all peak at the same time, forcing local adaptation.
